name: WHAD ButteRFly
label: WHAD ButteRFly — multi-protocol BLE/Zigbee/ESB/Unifying/Mosart/ANT nRF52840 research fw
description: whad-team/butterfly — sniff/scan/hijack + PDU-inject across BLE, Zigbee, Enhanced ShockBurst, Logitech Unifying, Mosart and ANT, driven from the host whad-client. Inject/hijack are active TX -> lab-only, authorized research only. No jammer/deauth. CC only flashes the firmware; the WHAD host authors any injected traffic.
note: Two flash paths on two existing built-but-unused backends: Nordic dongle via nrf_dfu (adafruit-nrfutil dfu serial -pkg butterfly-fwupgrade.zip), Makerdiary MDK via uf2 drag-drop (butterfly-mdk-fwupgrade.uf2). Do NOT bundle whad-client (host tool) — pip/host dependency, out of CC flash scope. VERIFY on real HW: nrf_dfu path shares chameleon/rnode_nrf's bench gate (zero prior HW-validated nrf_dfu consumers). All four inject/hijack paths are active TX -> danger lab-only; label the injection, never block. SHAs known from API but verify:.
